name: Rocky Road Bars
recipeInstructions:
- Preparation Time: 20 Minutes
- Bake Time: 30 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco.
2. For the base, melt 2/3 cup Butter Flavor Crisco and 4 ounces chocolate in a saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in 2 cups granulated sugar. Add eggs one at a time, stirring quickly into the hot mixture. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually mix into the chocolate mixture and spread evenly in the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
5. For the topping (prepare while base is baking), melt 1/4 cup Butter Flavor Crisco and 1 ounce chocolate in a medium saucepan over very low heat. Add evaporated milk and 1/2 cup granulated sugar, stirring until well blended and sugar dissolves. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in confectioners' sugar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract.
7. Drop spoonfuls of peanut butter into the hot chocolate mixture and swirl with a knife tip.
8. Sprinkle marshmallows over the cooked base.
9. Pour the chocolate peanut butter topping over the marshmallows. Cover immediately with foil. Cool completely, then cut into bars about 2 x 1 1/2 inches.
Makes 36 bars.
